content.en:
"Although this amount of pole-making material may not allow me to break the rest of the pole-making chains, it definitely makes up most of it. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Moreover, next, there were some super-perfect controllers who traded with Ye Tian in exchange for some Extreme Dao Source Stones.

Of course, the transaction process was all kept secret, so no one knew how many Extreme Dao Source Stones Ye Tian had in his hands.

However, they all knew very well that Ye Tian's Extreme Dao Source Stone must have a lot.

Many super-level perfect controllers were very curious, where did Ye Tian have so many Extreme Dao Source Stones?

And those super perfect masters who entered the Extreme Dao Source Sea guessed that Ye Tian had found a vein of Extreme Dao Source Stone in the Extreme Dao Source Sea, otherwise there was no way to explain it.

But Ye Tiancai is a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, even if he entered the Extreme Dao Source Sea and did not die, he also found an Extreme Dao Source Stone Vein, what kind of luck is this?

Time passed, and the news that Ye Tian had exchanged the Extreme Dao Source Stone for the Extreme Creation Material was transmitted.

Soon, the Lord of Time came to Ye Tian.

No Road Tower.

The Lord of Time contacted Ye Tian and met with Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian, you exchanged the Extreme Dao Source Stone for the Extreme Creation Substance, why didn't you come to me!"

The Lord of Time.

"Isn't this embarrassing to find you, the Lord of Time?" Ye Tian explained.

"I have a lot of Extreme Creation Substance in my hands, and I want to trade some Extreme Dao Source Stones with you!" said the Lord of Time.

Subsequently, the Lord of Time took out a lot of the Extreme Creation Substance.

"Lord of Time, the Extreme Dao Source Stone in my hand is the Extreme Dao Source Stone that contains the Golden Extreme Dao, I don't know if it will be useful to you, I can take out three thousand Extreme Dao Source Stones for you!" Ye Tian said.

3,000 Extreme Dao Source Stones!!

The Lord of Time was shocked, he thought that it would be good for his Extreme Creation Material to exchange for five hundred Extreme Dao Source Stones at most, but he didn't expect Ye Tian to give him three thousand Extreme Dao Source Stones.

Soon, he understood.

Ye Tian is giving him some more Extreme Dao Source Stones.

Suddenly, the Lord of Time smiled and said, "Hahaha, Ye Tian, you are so polite, I will accept it." As for the Golden Extreme Dao, although I haven't touched on it, I can go to enlightenment, for those of us who are super perfect controllers, if we comprehend one more extreme path, the greater the chance of impacting the perfect controller of the Void Realm in the future!"

In an instant, the Lord of Time and Ye Tian completed the transaction.

Not long after, the other super-perfect controllers of the Daoless Tower also came to contact Ye Tian.

However, Ye Tian was not familiar with them, so he only bought the Pole Creation Materials in their hands at a slightly higher price than the normal price, and gave them a little more Extreme Dao Source Stones, but it was far less than the Lord of Time.

Soon after, Ye Tian stopped collecting the Extreme Creation Substance, so it was almost enough.

In the future, even if the Extreme Dao Source Stone is traded, it will not be used to exchange for Extreme Creation Materials, but for other treasures.

......

The years are like traces.

Ye Tian used the pole-making material he traded to constantly assist himself in breaking the pole-making fragmentation, the foundation became stronger and stronger, and the body of the Extreme Dao became stronger and stronger.

Not only that, Ye Tian also began to comprehend the fourth extreme path - the extreme path of fire!

The reason why he participated in the Extreme Dao of Fire was because he could copy the body of the dragon crow, and the dragon crow contained the power of the rudimentary form of the extreme path of fire, if he realized the extreme path of fire, the strength of his dragon crow copy body would be even stronger.

Moreover, Longwu's copy of the body can also help him comprehend the Extreme Dao of Fire.

Therefore, it is better to take the extreme path of fire as the fourth extreme path to enlightenment.

this day.

Ye Tian once again copied Long Wu's body and entered the Extreme Dao Source Sea.

The last harvest was too big, so Ye Tian wanted to continue to gain more.

However, perhaps because of the running out of luck, although several treasures containing the power of the Extreme Dao were found this time, they were all occupied by those powerful Extreme Dao creatures.

As soon as he approached, he was warned by the extreme creatures.

Although those extreme creatures did not kill him, they did expel him.

"After all, the treasures that contain the power of the Extreme Dao are also very precious to those Extreme Dao creatures, if they fit their own Extreme Dao treasures, they can improve their strength, they will naturally not give up at will, and they will definitely occupy them. The last time I was able to obtain the Extreme Dao Source Stone Vein, it was lucky!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

More than two million eternal years have passed, Ye Tian finally comprehended the Extreme Dao of Fire, and the speed of comprehension this time was very fast, it only took such a little time to cross the Extreme Dao of Fire from the Perfect Dao of Fire to the Extreme Dao of Fire, the prototype of the Extreme Dao of Fire, to the mastery of the Extreme Dao of Fire.

Up to now, Ye Tian had mastered the four extreme paths.

"It's a pity that the Extreme Dao list has dissipated, otherwise my ranking could have increased a little more. "

Ye Tian muttered.

However, when the next time the Extreme Dao list opens, his ranking will definitely rise.

"Next, let's go to the Golden Extreme!"

Ye Tian decided.

He took some Golden Extreme Dao Source Stone and tried to comprehend it, and with the effect of Extreme Dao Mountain, the speed of comprehension was indeed very terrifying, far exceeding before.

At this speed of comprehension, with his comprehension and qualifications, at most 500,000 eternal years, he can completely grasp the Golden Extreme Dao.

Of course.

The value of the Extreme Dao Source Stone is too high, and if Ye Tian uses it like this, he will have to spend a lot of the remaining Extreme Dao Source Stone on his body.

Therefore, he still had to slowly comprehend and cultivate, anyway, he still had a long time to cultivate in the Space-Time Ancestral Realm, and there was no need to waste these Extreme Dao Source Stones.

......

Extreme Road Source Sea.

Ye Tian used the dragon black copy body to shuttle through the depths of the Extreme Dao Source Sea, and on this day, he sensed the breath of the Extreme Dao, and the Extreme Dao aura here actually contained several Extreme Dao.

"Could it be a super-perfect treasure?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

If it is a super-perfect treasure that has been bred, it has definitely been taken away by the Extreme Path.

The wisdom of these Extreme Dao creatures is not low, but due to the rules of the Extreme Dao Source Sea, they can't leave here, but they are also able to cast super-perfect treasures.

Because, he saw with his own eyes that two extreme creatures were fighting, and both of them were holding a super-perfect treasure.

However, he was stunned.

Of course, those two extreme creatures were just fighting, not fighting to the death.

Swish!

Ye Tian copied his body with dragon black, and soon came to a place that exuded an extreme aura.

Here, he saw an egg born in a warped space-time.

"It's not a super-perfect treasure, it turns out to be an extreme creature that hasn't been completely born yet!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But when he used his copy talent to probe this Extreme Creature Egg, he was shocked.

"Oh my God, this Extreme Creature has such a terrifying talent!!"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.
